title: cirsium swaticum
intro: Cirsium swaticum, also known as the prickly thistle or Russian thistle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cirsium swaticum include relief from digestive issues, reduction of fever, and treatment of wounds. Herbal preparations of Cirsium swaticum include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
